text: Both spaces feel strangely silent and almost abandoned. There is a coldness in the fluorescent lights and a sense of waiting or emptiness in the dark. I feel small and somewhat uneasy, as if I have entered after hours when no one is meant to be here. The hints of purpose on the wall (R+D) remind me of progress and curiosity, but the shadows cast doubt. I am caught between intrigue and the subtle anxiety of the unknown.
